title: Capacity, Observability, Support, and Production Operations · Stakeholder Product Defense
summary: Affected users, operators, support staff, accessibility reviewers, and reliability reviewers. They need controlled integration failures, calibrated human and accessibility evidence, realistic capacity, user-centered telemetry, tested runbooks, and a compound incident recovery. Planned artifact: Deliver Resilience, Human Evaluation, and Operations Game Day with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theo…
objectives: Assign effect identity, idempotency, ordering, concurrency, retry, timeout, unknown-outcome, compensation, and reconciliation rules.
Run representative tasks with neutral protocol, accommodations, observation, success criteria, breakdown capture, consent, and uncertainty.
Combine automated, keyboard, zoom, contrast, content, screen-reader or structured-text, and disabled-user evidence without unsupported conformance claims.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Project Distributed Effect
steps.instruction:
project case — Feature completion hides an unrealistic workload, system-centered metrics, inaccessible support, untested runbook, and no compound incident rehearsal. The project variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Commit to the mission model · Project Distributed Effect.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for assign effect identity, idempotency, ordering, concurrency, retry, timeout, unknown-outcome, compensation, and reconciliation rules. For Commit to the mission model · Project Distributed Effect, keep Distributed Effect connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: Feature completion hides an unrealistic workload, system-centered metrics, inaccessible support, untested runbook, and no compound incident rehearsal. The project variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Distributed Effect condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: ACM IEEE AAAI Computer Science Curricula 2023 — Controls competency-based progression, project work, professional practice, ethics, accessibility, security, testing, and the integration of knowledge with observable performance.

options.text: At-least-once delivery becomes exactly once with a deduplication set. That claim fails the commit to the mission model evidence boundary for Distributed Effect.

For commit to the mission model, apply Distributed Effect without its stated preconditions, omit the operational readiness and capacity case trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof.
